title: linaria oligantha subsp. oligantha
intro: Linaria oligantha subsp. oligantha, also known as the small-toothed toadflax or small-flowered toadflax, is a perennial herb belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Linaria oligantha subsp. oligantha include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
